label: Transformational: advances Declaration Act commitments, shifts decision‑making/benefit‑sharing, and/or improves community well‑being.…see Reconciliation Options tab
Enabling: upholds the honour of the Crown when activities may impact Aboriginal interests, improves current/future conditions for reconciliation...see Reconciliation Options tab
Minimal Contribution: has minimal impact on Aboriginal rights, interests, or reconciliation outcomes…see Reconciliation Options tab
